heading: Connellys Marsh vs Cooee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Connellys Marsh, Tasmania and Cooee, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Connellys Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Cooee (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Connellys Marsh or Cooee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Connellys Marsh has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Cooee scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Connellys Marsh scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Cooee scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Connellys Marsh or Cooee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Connellys Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
